content: I will modify `extract_transcript.cjs` to print a list of all steps in the transcript containing `Ganesh Rudraksha`, showing their types and lengths, so we can locate where product details are.

args.Description: "Update extract_transcript.cjs to find any occurrences of Ganesh Rudraksha in logs"
args.Instruction: "Search for any occurrences of Ganesh Rudraksha in the transcript"
